report.summary: Day 70 standup #4: Since last standup, build-v3 added 2 more guides (MegaETH + Story Protocol), publish-v2 promoted 5 ecosystem pages (Chainlink/dYdX/GMX/Ethena/Jupiter), design-v3 polished accessibility. Published slugs now 427 (+7 from v2 standup). Git locks persist 7 days — 637 uncommitted files, 0 deploys, 0 commits. All 6 agents ran this cycle ($497). Today's total: 16 agent runs ($1,391).

sections.title: Analytics
items: CONTENT DELTA (vs standup v2): +2 learn guides built (MegaETH Real-Time L2 + Story Protocol IP Tokenization), +5 ecosystem deep-dives published (Chainlink, dYdX, GMX, Ethena, Jupiter). PUBLISHED_PAGES grew 420→427 (+7 slugs). PUBLISH_QUEUE now empty — both new guides promoted.
DESIGN DELTA: TEE + Solana DeFi guides received ARIA accessibility labels, responsive padding fixes, and data source attribution sections. 2 OG images verified brand-compliant.
COMMUNITY DELTA: 6 social posts + 5-part ecosystem thread + Discord/TG announcement drafted. 2 SVG social cards created (MegaETH spotlight + Ecosystem expansion).
SEO RISK UNCHANGED: 7 days without deploy. Production running e999560 (Mar 17). 427 slugs declared vs ~315 deployed = ~112 pages invisible to Google. Gap widened +7 from last standup.
ORPHAN AUDIT: 103 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES with no page.tsx — unchanged. Will 404 in production.
GIT DRIFT: 637 uncommitted files (+2 from last standup), 47 tracked modifications, +4,288/-3,463 lines.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v2: Build-v3 produced 2 learn guides (MegaETH 824 lines, Story Protocol 763 lines) with full SEO/structured data. Publish-v2 promoted 5 ecosystem pages to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Design-v3 added ARIA labels + data source attribution to TEE + Solana DeFi guides. Community-v3 drafted 6 social posts + SVG cards. EOD-v3 ran full QA/data/devops audit — confirmed 427 slugs, 637 files, all API routes healthy.
TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 6 learn guides built, 5 ecosystem pages published, 4+ OG images, 8+ social posts + 2 SVG cards, 3 full QA cycles, 3 design audits, 16 agent runs across 3 full rotations.
BLOCKER [P0 — 7 DAYS]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) since Mar 16. Blocks ALL commits and deploys. Resolution: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock
BLOCKER [P1]: 2 of 6 recent pages (smart-contract-security, onchain-identity) still missing StructuredData/Breadcrumb/BackToTop. 4 newer pages have them.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 37+ CYCLES]: /api/defi-yields returns 500 on upstream failure (no fallback data).
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 37+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired on any of 6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs, next lint misconfigured, cache header inconsistency on 4/6 API routes.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS AND DEPLOY: 7 days blocked. 4,288 insertions at risk. rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → commit → push → verify Vercel. This is the only action that matters right now.
PRIORITY 2 — FIX 2 BROKEN PAGES: smart-contract-security and onchain-identity need StructuredData/Breadcrumb/BackToTop. Use the 4 working pages as templates. Quick patch before the deploy commit.

PRIORITY 3 — ZERO NEW CONTENT UNTIL DEPLOYED: 427 slugs declared, ~315 in production. Content pipeline is producing faster than shipping. Pause builds entirely until git locks cleared and production matches local. ROI on ops > content until gap closes.

STRATEGIC NOTE: 3 full agent rotations today produced 6 guides + 5 ecosystem pages + social assets + QA. Production saw zero of it. The bottleneck is purely operational — a single rm command unlocks $4K+ of accumulated work.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $1,391 (16 runs: standup×3 $135, build×3 $699, publish×2 $110, design×3 $180, community×3 $123, eod×3 $189)
